bundles.title: Declare CoreRunState and LocalRunState partition
bundles.goal: Split RunState into CoreRunState and LocalRunState in src/types/contracts.ts with an intersection alias preserving the RunState name.

tasks.title: Enumerate current RunState fields and classify each as core vs local per design D1
Add CoreRunState interface with 12 runtime-agnostic fields (phase, status, history, agents, events, source, identity, timestamps, lineage, run_kind)
Add LocalRunState interface with 6 local-adapter fields (project_id, repo_name, repo_path, branch_name, worktree_path, last_summary_path)
Redeclare RunState as CoreRunState & LocalRunState intersection alias
Add warning comment near declarations: 'Adding a new field? Put it in CoreRunState or LocalRunState, not RunState.'
Run bun run typecheck to confirm no consumer breaks

bundles.title: Add compile-time partition drift guard
bundles.goal: Create src/tests/run-state-partition.test.ts with AssertEqual assertions enforcing disjointness and exhaustive coverage of RunState.

tasks.title: Create src/tests/run-state-partition.test.ts with AssertEqual helper type
Add disjointness assertion: keyof CoreRunState & keyof LocalRunState === never
Add exhaustiveness assertion: keyof CoreRunState | keyof LocalRunState === keyof RunState
Add a no-op describe.skip/it.skip runtime export so the harness does not flag the file as unused
Verify bun run typecheck passes; verify deliberate perturbation (duplicate key) causes typecheck failure

bundles.title: Narrow core mutator signatures with generic bound
bundles.goal: Re-type advanceRun, suspendRun, resumeRun, and internal loadRunState/writeRunState helpers with <T extends CoreRunState = RunState>.

tasks.title: Narrow loadRunState and writeRunState in src/core/_helpers.ts with <T extends CoreRunState = RunState>
Run bun run typecheck after _helpers.ts change to catch inference regressions
Narrow advanceRun in src/core/advance.ts to return Result<T, CoreRuntimeError> with <T extends CoreRunState = RunState>
Run bun run typecheck after advance.ts change
Narrow suspendRun in src/core/suspend.ts with the same generic bound
Run bun run typecheck after suspend.ts change
Narrow resumeRun in src/core/resume.ts with the same generic bound
Run bun run typecheck after resume.ts change
Confirm startChangeRun, startSyntheticRun, readRunStatus, getRunField, updateRunField remain on RunState per D3/D4
Run full bun run test to confirm no behavioral regressions

bundles.title: Update architecture docs to reference the new split
bundles.goal: Remove 'field-level split deferred' caveats from docs/architecture.md and reference CoreRunState/LocalRunState.

tasks.title: Update 'Run-state JSON structure' inventory row: replace 'Not yet supported' caveat with description of type-level split and reference to follow-up schema-split change
Update core-adjacent modules subsection: remove 'the field-level split is deferred to a separate follow-up proposal' and reference CoreRunState/LocalRunState
Update persistence concerns subsection: replace mixed-fields enumeration with description of the split
Add reference to src/tests/run-state-partition.test.ts drift guard so its purpose is visible outside the test file
Grep docs/architecture.md to confirm no remaining 'field-level split deferred' phrases
